description.ko: 위성 시점에서 바라본 지구 표면의 다양한 질감을 고해상도로 탐구하며, 지질학적 형성물과 광물 퇴적층의 추상적인 아름다움을 포착합니다.
description.en: A high-resolution exploration of Earth's diverse surface textures, capturing the abstract beauty of geological formations and mineral deposits from a satellite perspective.

prompt: Cinematic satellite photography, extreme close-up of Earth's surface, intricate textures of crystalline salt flats, deep jagged canyons, and swirling desert sands, vibrant natural mineral colors, high resolution, 8k, abstract geological patterns, topographic details, sharp focus, natural lighting.
